message.Pop-ups1: The internal version you are using requires floating window access to display feedback entrance
message.Pop-ups2-1: Your feedback cannot be uploaded if floating window access is not allowed!
message.Pop-ups2-2: You can go to "Settings" - "Apps" - "Advanced" - "Draw over other apps" to set up floating window
message.guidepage_title_detail: The beta version of the app needs to go to Feishu to verify your identity
message.hide_float_window_content: After hiding, the feedback floating window will no longer be displayed. If you need to restore it, please reinstall the app or update the app
message.key_priori_description:
P0: Blocker. It affects the core functions of the tested demands or causes defect of core functions of the tested system. This defect makes core business process unavailable, or have a large impact on it so the test cannot be continued. 

P1: Critical. It causes a functional defect that affects the core business process or makes the non-core business process unavailable. 

P2: Major. It causes a functional defect that has a impact on non-core business process or leads to UE problems. 

P3: Minor. It causes non-functional defects such as: UI errors that do not affect functions, prompt errors without major ambiguity, etc. 

P4: Trivial. Optimization suggestions which don't belong to defects in a strict sense but just some points that can be optimized.
message.getProblem: Encountered a problem with feedback? Go to Lark alpha test onCall and tell us
